description: Headless toolchain to build, model-check, and prove Rodin Event-B models
notes: Windows runs the headless toolchain through the linux/amd64 Docker image
(ghcr.io/eventb-rossi/rodin-headless) - the engine is a Unix shell toolchain, so
it does not run natively yet. Needs Docker Desktop, or Podman Desktop via
RODIN_RUNTIME=podman. No Java is needed on Windows (the JDK runs in the container);
the first real run pulls ~1.3 GB. 'rodin-headless help' and 'rodin-headless --version'
work offline with no engine. RODIN_IMAGE / RODIN_BUILD_TIMEOUT tune the image ref and
